listings.name: Groome Transport
listings.description: Outstanding commercial property with excellent visibility. A rare opportunity to acquire a well-established commercial property in Albany, Oregon. This property features excellent highway visibility and access, making it ideal for a variety of commercial uses.

listings.name: 201 Roberts Creek Rd. (Lot 3)
listings.description: Commercial land with flexible zoning. Excellent opportunity for commercial development in Roseburg. Flexible zoning allows for a variety of uses.

listings.name: 4807 SW Grange Rd. (Lot 2)
listings.description: Commercial Land with flexible zoning. Excellent commercial land opportunity in Roseburg with flexible zoning for a variety of development uses.

listings.name: 4885 SW Grange Road (Lot 1)
listings.description: Commercial Land with flexible zoning. Prime commercial land in Roseburg with flexible zoning. Ideal for a variety of commercial development projects.

listings.name: Kammerer Industrial Park
listings.description: Rare industrial complex featuring 10 buildings, 1 residence and storage facility, located outside city limits, sitting on 22 acres. Approximately 4 acres zoned Rural Industrial with 18 acres zoned EFU. Long term tenants keep the units full. Plenty of room to expand. Low taxes (no city taxes), water supplied by 2 wells. 240 and 440 3-phase power present. Seller carry financing available with negotiable terms.

listings.name: 520 SW 3rd Avenue
listings.description: With Downtown Mixed Use, there's not much limiting you. Your business and vision need a home so why not here? DMU allows for your medical or dental office as well as coffee shop, salon, boutique, CPA or attorney's firm. Full kitchen still intact as well as many private offices or work stations. Parking available next to building and signage may be placed in front of the building.

listings.name: Kammerer Industrial Park Bldg J North
listings.description: Industrial warehouse/flex space at the Kammerer Industrial Park, located outside city limits near Corvallis. Features 3-12' sliding doors and man door. Ideal for light manufacturing, storage, or flex industrial use.

listings.name: Pacific
listings.description: Community Commercial means your business will probably work here! Zoning allows for so many options including medical, dental, retail and office. Join two national tenants in this high traffic Pacific Boulevard location near West Albany High School. Plenty of shared parking available. Owner will consider tenant improvements (TI) with long term tenancy partnership.

listings.name: 108 Clover Leaf Loop
listings.description: Bring your business to this high traffic location located just off of I-5 in Sutherlin. With the changing tide to electric automobiles, locating your business next to one of the largest Tesla charging stations in the valley is a monumental advantage. Convenient and quick I-5 access — you'll be one of the first businesses they see! Next to Tesla Charging station, Subway, Starbucks, Taco Bell, Tractor Supply and more.
